overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a desert highway in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring futuristic circular wind turbines, an iconic large billboard with 'HATE' text, and sparse vehicle traffic under harsh midday sun.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the desert highway approaching the iconic HATE billboard. The arid landscape is dotted with futuristic circular wind turbines and sparse desert vegetation including cacti. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the asphalt road under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with concrete barriers and approaching empty billboard

events.description: red sports car passes by quickly on the right
white truck drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past the HATE billboard, moving alongside red and white barriers

white truck driving along the road

segments.scene_description: Passing the HATE billboard and continuing along the highway now lined with red and white concrete barriers on the left. Several vehicles including a red sports car and white truck pass by. An empty billboard structure becomes visible in the distance ahead as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway beyond barriers with distant wind farm

events.description: orange van drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the open highway with barriers now behind, approaching and passing the empty billboard

notable_agents.action: orange van driving past on the highway

entered.detail: scattered trash and debris along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Moving past the road barriers into a more open section of the desert highway. The camera approaches and passes the empty billboard structure while continuing toward the distant wind farm. The landscape remains arid with futuristic wind turbines dotting the horizon under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desolate desert highway that transitions from a landscape of iconic signage to an open expanse of futuristic energy infrastructure. It begins with a walk toward a massive billboard emblazoned with the word HATE, passing circular wind turbines and sparse cacti under a harsh midday sun. As the camera moves past the billboard, the road becomes lined with red and white concrete barriers while a red sports car and a white truck streak past in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the barriers behind and glides past a skeletal, empty billboard structure. Finally, the perspective pushes forward into the arid wasteland, heading toward a distant wind farm that dots the horizon under a clear blue sky.
